tiktok.caption: Your 401k loan gets taxed TWICE — and that $20K costs you $152,000 in retirement. The math is brutal.

youtube_short.title: Your 401k Loan Gets Taxed Twice ($152K Gone)
title_alternatives: The $152K Mistake Hiding in Your 401k Loan
Why 401k Loans Cost 7x More Than You Think
youtube_short.description: One in four people with a 401k has taken a loan from it — and almost nobody knows the IRS double-taxes that money. You repay the loan with after-tax dollars, then pay income tax again at withdrawal. That same $20,000 gets taxed twice. And the compounding math is even worse — that $20K out of your portfolio for 30 years misses growing into $152,000. Lose your job while the loan's open? The whole balance is due immediately or it's income plus a 10% penalty. Watch before you ever touch your retirement. #401k #retirement #personalfinance #moneytips #investing
